mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, compressing valuation multiples and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns during rate cuts are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid deterioration in the unemployment rate signals weakening labor demand and reduced consumer spending capacity, which forces equity markets to price in lower corporate revenues and produces negative forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the negative signal, or the unemployment spike fails to correlate with earnings downgrades.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand strength, driving higher corporate profit expectations and generating positive equity returns over a quarterly horizon.
failure_condition: The joint signal shows no predictive power over single-series effects, or interaction term coefficients are statistically insignificant in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production indicates robust manufacturing output and supply-side capacity utilization, which supports near-term corporate earnings growth and yields positive short-term market returns.
failure_condition: The signal reverses direction during tightening periods, or 5-day forward returns show no statistical relationship with industrial production growth.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained elevation of the consumer price index above the central bank target forces aggressive monetary tightening expectations, increasing discount rates and compressing equity valuations to produce negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Equity markets continue to rally despite high inflation readings, or the inflation threshold fails to predict subsequent rate hike expectations.

mechanism_narrative: Strong nonfarm payroll growth combined with a stable unemployment rate confirms a resilient labor market that sustains wage growth and consumer expenditure, driving positive equity market performance.
failure_condition: The interaction between payroll growth and unemployment stability shows zero incremental predictive value, or the combined signal yields negative returns in > 55% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly gross domestic product growth exceeding potential output signals an overheating economy with strong aggregate demand, which translates directly into higher corporate earnings and positive forward equity returns.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or GDP growth fails to predict quarterly equity returns after controlling for monetary policy.

mechanism_narrative: Consecutive monthly declines in industrial production signal a contraction in manufacturing activity and supply chain bottlenecks, which reduces corporate profit margins and triggers negative short-term market returns.
failure_condition: The market fails to price in the production decline, or 5-day forward returns remain positive in > 65% of triggered instances despite the contraction signal.
